_meta.notes: setup required — api key needed. No phase classifications returned (auth_mode=public/unauthenticated). FEWS NET FDW typically requires partner-level credentials for IPC-style data. To enable, request an account from the FEWS NET Help Desk (https://fewsnet.atlassian.net/servicedesk/customer/portal/2/group/-1) and set FDW_USERNAME + FDW_PASSWORD in GitHub repo secrets.
